name: demo_replay_baseline
description: Ordered replay plan for the final defense demo, starting from benign traffic and introducing malicious scenarios incrementally.

stages.label: benign
stages.purpose: Establish a clean baseline with normal traffic.

stages.label: arp_spoof
stages.purpose: Trigger spoofing-oriented alerts and blacklist candidate generation.

stages.label: ddos
stages.purpose: Show burst traffic patterns, rising alert counts, and dashboard trend changes.

stages.label: trojan
stages.purpose: Demonstrate suspicious command-and-control style traffic classification.
